nasb.text: His legs are pillars of alabaster Set on pedestals of pure gold; His appearance is like Lebanon Choice as the cedars.

esv.text: His legs are alabaster columns, set on bases of gold. His appearance is like Lebanon, choice as the cedars.

cnv.text: 他的雙腿像大理石柱， 安放在精金的座上； 他的容貌如黎巴嫩山， 像佳美的香柏樹。

ccb.text: 他的双腿好像纯金座上的白玉石柱， 体格如黎巴嫩挺拔的香柏树。
